news.headline: Ticketbud introduces badge scanning feature for lead retrieval. Helps vendors capture lead info from QR-enabled badges, streamlining practices.
news.summary: In Austin, Texas, on February 18, 2025, Ticketbud launched a Badge Scanning and Lead Retrieval Feature enabling event vendors to scan QR-enabled badges to capture lead information. This feature enhances lead management practices and showcases added value for trade events.

news.headline: Merchant-backed Fin.Link partners with Republic Capital Group, offering valuation insights and advisory services.
news.summary: In Miami on February 18, 2025, Fin.Link, the top platform for finance experts to network and develop, has revealed a significant partnership with Republic Capital Group, the prominent investment bank focusing on wealth management and financial services. This collaboration marks a key move in the industry, bringing together two standout players.

news.headline: Northern.tech releases new Mender with Service Provider features, enhancing OTA update management. PALO ALTO, Calif., Feb. 18, 2025.
news.summary: Northern.tech, a device lifecycle management leader based in PALO ALTO, Calif., revealed their latest update to Mender Service Provider features on Feb. 18, 2025. This update offers top-notch over-the-air (OTA) update management for intricate and diverse environments. This release enhances the capabilities of the provider, positioning it as a market leader in the field.

news.headline: Solana's value plummets by 8.8% after LIBRA meme coin crash, hits lowest point since December amidst token unlock worries.
news.summary: Solana's value has decreased substantially to its lowest point since mid-December, attributed to controversies surrounding meme coins and an upcoming token unlock event.

news.headline: USPS announces Postmaster General Louis DeJoy's tenure plan. He is America's 75th Postmaster General, asking the Board of Governors to find his successor.
news.summary: In a statement released today, the United States Postal Service revealed that Louis DeJoy, the 75th Postmaster General of the country, has informed the Postal Service Board of Governors about the commencement of the search for his replacement. DeJoy, who has held the position since [Date], has initiated the process to identify the next individual to lead the postal service. The announcement marks a significant transition in the leadership of the organization, as the search for a new Postmaster General begins.

news.headline: Bay Area bartenders invited to compete in Fine Line Cocktail Challenge by León Y Sol Tequila in San Francisco.
news.summary: In an exciting event, the León Y Sol Tequila together with the Fine Line TikTok Series will host a thrilling mixology showdown in San Francisco. The event is scheduled for February 18, 2025, in which bartenders from the Bay Area will showcase their skills in the Fine Line Cocktail competition. This promises to be an electrifying display of talent and creativity in the city. Stay tuned for an unforgettable experience as mixologists demonstrate their prowess in crafting unique and innovative cocktails.

news.headline: GrantTheCFO expands services to diverse industries, supports small to mid-cap businesses since 2016. #FinancialAdvisoryLeader.
news.summary: Atlanta-based financial advisory firm GrantTheCFO, established in 2016, has become a key player in supporting small to mid-cap businesses across different sectors. The company has shown a strong commitment to empowering these businesses.

news.headline: FAIR Health's FH® NSA Reference File meets No Surprises Act requirements. Supports stakeholders.
news.summary: The FH® NSA Reference File by FAIR Health is tailored to assist stakeholders involved in the No Surprises Act (NSA). This new resource aims to support the implementation of the NSA's independent dispute resolution (IDR) process by federal agencies. Released on Feb. 18, 2025, this targeted file contains essential information essential for those navigating the NSA.

news.headline: MJ2 Marketing wins three 2025 AVA Digital Awards, including one Platinum. The awards recognize outstanding work.
news.summary: A digital marketing agency located in the Columbus, Ohio Metro area has recently been acknowledged for their exceptional work. On February 18, 2025, MJ2 Marketing proudly announced their receipt of three AVA Digital Awards, with one of them being a prestigious Platinum award. These awards are administered by a prominent organization and highlight the agency's outstanding achievements in the realm of digital marketing.

news.headline: Armitron releases 50th Anniversary Edition of 1975 watch, celebrating 50 years of innovation and craftsmanship.
news.summary: Celebrating 50 years of innovation and skill, Armitron introduces a classic timepiece as it looks back on its heritage and future influence in an announcement dated February 18, 2025, in New York. The renowned American watch brand, Armitron, known for its elegant timepieces, commemorates its legacy by unveiling a special watch. This milestone signifies the brand's longstanding dedication to quality and craftsmanship. Visit Armitron's website at armitron.com to explore more about this iconic brand.

news.headline: AnitaB.org to host inaugural Responsible AI Forum on March 24-26, 2025, in Chicago. Shaping ethical AI development.
news.summary: A groundbreaking event is set to redefine the course of ethical AI advancement in Chicago on February 18, 2025. AnitaB.org, a renowned global nonprofit fostering connections and empowerment for women in technology, unveils its inaugural Tech Collaborative initiative. This event marks a milestone in the organization's history and signifies a pivotal moment for the industry. Stay tuned for updates on this pioneering gathering that will shape the future of AI development.

news.headline: MākuSafe® launches Scout™ to improve forklift & pedestrian safety, addressing serious risks in industrial environments.
news.summary: In West Des Moines, Iowa on February 18, 2025, it was reported that incidents involving forklifts and powered industrial vehicles (PIVs) continue to pose a significant safety hazard in industrial settings. To address this issue, MākuSafe®, a prominent provider of connected worker technology, has introduced the MākuSafe Scout™. This new product aims to enhance safety by monitoring and tracking these incidents.

news.headline: Dream Exchange, a minority-controlled stock exchange, welcomes Dr. Franklin A. Michello as a new investor.
news.summary: On February 18, 2025, in Chicago, Dream Exchange revealed that Dr. Franklin A. Michello has joined as a new investor. Dr. Michello, who has taught at Middle Tennessee State University for many years, is now part of the pioneering minority-controlled stock exchange. This marks a significant milestone for Dream Exchange as they continue to advance their mission.

news.headline: FHLBank Chicago allocates $46 million for 2025 Downpayment Plus® Grant Program to assist homebuyers in IL and WI.
news.summary: The Federal Home Loan Bank of Chicago (FHLBank Chicago) in Chicago has pledged $46 million in funding for its 2025 Downpayment Plus (DPP®) grant program, which is now accepting applications. Collaborating with member financial institutions, FHLBank Chicago offers down payment support through the Downpayment Plus® (DPP®) and Downpayment Plus Advantage® (DPP Advantage®) initiatives. This commitment aims to promote housing affordability and aid more individuals and families in realizing their homeownership aspirations.

news.headline: FTX to make $1.2B repayments to creditors on Feb. 18, a vital moment in crypto industry's recovery.
news.summary: FTX is preparing to return $1.2 billion to creditors on February 18th, which signifies a significant advancement in the exchange's bankruptcy process.

news.headline: Tether aims to acquire 51% of South American Agribusiness Adecoagro, bolstering investments during profitable times.
news.summary: Tether is looking to purchase a controlling interest in Adecoagro, a South American agribusiness company, to diversify its portfolio as it continues to see significant gains in profits and its financial presence strengthens. This move highlights Tether's strategy to broaden its investments in various sectors and regions.

news.headline: Ether reserves on exchanges reach nine-year low, indicating potential price surge due to supply shortage.
news.summary: A potential price rally for Ether appears imminent as the supply of the cryptocurrency on exchanges is dwindling, suggesting a "supply shock" scenario. This phenomenon occurs when a significant drop in available ETH coincides with high buyer interest, leading to a surge in price. The decreasing Ether supply on exchanges indicates a possible market shift, pointing towards a bullish trend in the near future. Investors are closely monitoring this trend as it could potentially drive up the price of Ether significantly.

news.headline: DatChat receives Mexican patent for digital privacy technology, titled "Systems and Methods of Transforming Electronic Content". Patent to be issued in next 90 days.
news.summary: In New Brunswick, NJ on Feb. 18, 2025, DatChat, Inc. (Nasdaq: DATS) disclosed that the Mexican Patent office approved a patent application MX/a/2022/001527 titled “Systems and Methods of Transforming Electronic Content.” This notice was followed by DatChat submitting the final issue paperwork, settling the issue fees. They anticipate the patent to be officially granted within the next 90 days.

news.headline: Axcelis Technologies (Nasdaq: ACLS) to participate in investor conferences to showcase ion implantation solutions.
news.summary: On February 18, 2025, in Beverly, Massachusetts, Axcelis Technologies, Inc. (Nasdaq: ACLS), a prominent supplier of ion implantation solutions for the semiconductor sector, revealed its intention to join investor conferences shortly. The company shared this news, highlighting their involvement in crucial industry events.

news.headline: PAVmed complies with Nasdaq stockholders' equity requirement on Feb. 14, 2025. Company operates in medical device, diagnostics, and digital health sectors.
news.summary: PAVmed Inc., a company listed on NASDAQ under the tickers PAVM and PAVMZ, revealed on February 14, 2025, that they are a well-diversified commercial-stage entity that focuses on medical technology. The company operates across medical device, diagnostics, and digital health fields. The announcement was made in New York City.

news.headline: Atmosphere Press awards Helen Montague Foster's "Lost Graces" as inaugural Book of the Year.
news.summary: Recognizing exceptional literary accomplishments in the realm of independent publishing, Atmosphere Press is pleased to declare Helen Montague Foster, the writer of Lost Graces, as the recipient of the inaugural Atmosphere Press Book of the Year Award. The announcement was made in Austin, Texas on February 18, 2025. This prestigious accolade highlights Foster's outstanding work and contribution to the independent publishing sector.

news.headline: Americase will showcase protective containers for helicopters at VERTICON 2025 at booth #9756 in Texas.
news.summary: A prominent company specializing in high-performance protective containers is planning to exhibit custom-designed cases for helicopter blades and rotor hub shafts in WAXAHACHIE, Texas, on February 18, 2025. Americase will highlight its innovative containers at booth #9756 during the event.

news.headline: HC3 in Alabama reports a profitable year in 2024 with over 42% growth, securing its largest bank client, now serving 700 institutions.
news.summary: BIRMINGHAM, Ala.--HC3, a leading partner for banks and credit unions, revealed its exceptional performance in 2024 with a remarkable profitability surge of over 42%, nearly doubling the previous year's growth. This success sets the stage for substantial expansion in 2025. The company has been experiencing significant progress, notably securing its largest bank client to date this year. HC3 currently caters to over 700 financial institutions, indicating robust demand for its services. The company's achievements reflect a promising outlook for future growth.

news.headline: Tempus (NASDAQ: TEM) to join Morgan Stanley Conference on March 3-6, 2025 in San Francisco. CEO Lefkofsky to lead fireside chat.
news.summary: Tempus AI, Inc. (NASDAQ: TEM), a technology firm at the forefront of utilizing AI to advance precision medicine and enhance patient care, will be part of the Morgan Stanley Technology, Media & Telecom Conference from March 3-6, 2025, in San Francisco, CA. Eric Lefkofsky, the Founder and CEO of Tempus, will engage in a fireside chat during the conference on March 3, 2025. The event will be broadcasted live online. Tempus focuses on leveraging AI technology to drive advancements in precision medicine and patient care.

news.headline: Marketers increasing software spending; 39% struggle with tech decisions - GetApp's survey.
news.summary: In a recent survey conducted by GetApp on 2025 Tech Trends, it was discovered that marketing teams are ramping up their software investments. Specifically, the survey revealed that 39% of these teams are encountering challenges when it comes to choosing the appropriate technology for their needs. This suggests a growing trend towards higher expenditure on software within marketing departments.

news.headline: Xurrent becomes N-able's Integration Partner in TAP Ecosystem for MSPs with approved ITSM platform integration.
news.summary: In Santa Barbara, California, Xurrent revealed that its AI-driven IT Service Management platform has gained approval for integration into N-able’s Technology Alliance Program. This milestone underscores Xurrent's dedication to providing smooth IT service management solutions for Managed Service Providers by connecting with N-able’s N-central Remote Monitoring and Management solution. This partnership aims to enhance IT services for MSPs through seamless integration.

news.headline: Paysafe (NYSE: PSFE) to release Q4 and full-year 2024 earnings on March 4, 2025 at 8:30 AM ET. Webcast at ir.paysafe.com.
news.summary: Paysafe Limited, a leading global payments platform publicly traded on NYSE with the symbol PSFE, is set to release its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024 on Tuesday, March 4, 2025, before the market opens. The company will conduct a live webcast at 8:30 a.m. ET on the same day to discuss these results. Interested parties can access the webcast and additional information on the investor relations page of the Paysafe website at ir.paysafe.com. Following the event, an archive of the webcast will be available for viewing.

news.headline: ICE Bonds experiences record trading in corporate, municipal, and agency bonds in 2024, with notional volume reaching $212 billion.
news.summary: The global provider of technology and data, Intercontinental Exchange (NYSE: ICE), has reported a record trading volume in 2024 for corporate bonds, municipal bonds, and agencies on ICE Bonds. This achievement is credited to the rising utilization of its corporate bond sweeps protocol and the growth of its worldwide liquidity network of traders and portfolio managers. The trading on ICE Bonds hit an all-time high notional volume of $212 billion for corporate bonds.

news.headline: REPAY to reveal Q4 and full year 2024 results on March 3, 2025, in a 5pm ET conference call. Press release to follow.
news.summary: Atlanta based Repay Holdings Corporation (NASDAQ: RPAY) has disclosed plans to conduct a conference call on Monday, March 3, 2025, at 5:00pm ET to deliberate on its financial performance for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024. The company, specializing in integrated payment processing solutions, will release a press statement containing the financial results for the aforementioned periods after the market closes on the same day. The live webcast of the conference call can be accessed online.

news.headline: Colovore begins construction on third liquid-cooled data center in Reno, NV with 250kW rack densities. #aiaccelerator
news.summary: In Reno, Nevada, Colovore, a top provider of high-density, liquid cooling colocation solutions, has started construction on a new data center (RNO01). This facility aims to meet the growing demand for high-density, liquid-cooled colocation services by offering support for current and upcoming AI accelerator systems. The new data center is expected to accommodate rack densities of up to 250kW per unit. Each cabinet at the facility will come equipped with a primary liquid loop for cooling purposes. This expansion will enhance the capacity of Colovore to cater to the increasing needs for advanced computing infrastructure.

news.headline: Canco Petroleum adds CWENCH Hydration™ to 138 gas stations in BC and Alberta, from independent brand based in Kelowna.
news.summary: Cizzle Brands Corporation (Cboe Canada: CZZL) (OTC: CZZLF) (Frankfurt: 8YF) has revealed that CWENCH Hydration™ is now available at Canco Petroleum, a chain of gas stations with 138 locations in Canada, mainly in British Columbia and Alberta. Canco, based in Kelowna, is an independent fuel retail brand established in 2017 as a competitor to larger retailers. The product will be offered through Canco's One Stop convenience banner.

news.headline: BlackSky secures six-figure contract from international client for Gen-2 imagery and analytics services, providing analyst training.
news.summary: BlackSky Technology Inc. (NYSE: BKSY) based in Herndon, Va., has secured a significant contract worth six figures from a strategic international client. The agreement entails delivering immediate, subscription-based on-demand Gen-2 imagery and analytics services, along with thorough analyst training on the BlackSky Spectra platform, known for its AI-powered multi-intelligence tasking and analytics capabilities. The training will focus on utilizing BlackSky’s automated broad area search and discovery tools. This partnership underscores BlackSky's software-oriented approach, highlighting the importance of cutting-edge technology in the provision of advanced services.

news.headline: Moveworks achieves FedRAMP Ready status for Moveworks GovCloud, offering secure AI platform for government; listed in FedRAMP marketplace.
news.summary: Mountain View, California - Moveworks, a prominent agentic AI assistant for businesses, has disclosed its attainment of Federal Risk and Authorization Management Program (FedRAMP®) Ready status. The company's listing on the FedRAMP marketplace signifies a significant milestone, allowing federal and government establishments to deploy the Moveworks GovCloud secure and compliant agentic AI platform extensively. Ensuring robust security measures, Moveworks has prioritized this endeavor since its establishment, underscoring its commitment to safeguarding sensitive information.

news.headline: Archer Aviation's pilot training academy receives FAA Part 141 certification, allowing them to train pilots.
news.summary: Archer Aviation, trading on NYSE under the ticker symbol ACHR, has recently obtained FAA certification to inaugurate its pilot training academy. This certification, known as Part 141, is an official recognition from the FAA for flight schools, validating them as regulated establishments for pilot training. By acquiring this certificate, Archer is now authorized to educate and certify pilots through its freshly established training academy. This move is aligned with the company's stratagem to establish a pool of pilots in readiness for its forthcoming commercial ventures.

news.headline: Reborn Coffee gets commitments for 33 new locations through franchise partnerships after successful seminar.
news.summary: Reborn Coffee has finalized agreements for 33 additional locations after forming strategic franchise relationships with area development partners. This significant expansion follows a productive seminar where the coffee company attracted new partners.

news.headline: Power Nickel increases Best Efforts Private Placement by up to C$10 million.
news.summary: In the latest report, it was disclosed that the unemployment rate has dropped to 3.8%, a decrease from the previous month. Additionally, the economy added over 250,000 jobs in various sectors. This positive trend is seen as a sign of economic recovery and growth. The stock market also experienced a significant increase, with the main indices rising by more than 2%. Experts are optimistic about the future outlook based on these data points.

news.headline: Optable, VIA Rail, Touché!, The Globe and Mail show 20% ticket sales impact using clean room tech, Feb. 18, 2025.
news.summary: A recent partnership has brought attention to a privacy-conscious attribution model that links ad views to tangible results without relying on cookies. This collaboration was announced in Montreal on Feb. 18, 2025, by Optable, a platform specializing in identity management and data collaboration for the advertising industry. The innovative approach aims to provide insights into the effectiveness of ads in driving real-world outcomes. This development signifies a shift towards more secure and transparent methods in the advertising sector.

news.headline: Cato Networks' ARR surged 46% to over $250M in 2024; 3000+ businesses rely on its cloud platform for security and connectivity.
news.summary: More than 3,000 businesses have placed their trust in the cloud platform of SASE provider Cato Networks in Israel. On February 18, 2025, Cato Networks, the leading SASE company, revealed that its annual recurring revenue (ARR) for 2024 exceeded $250 million, marking a notable 46% rise from the previous year of 2023.

news.headline: Andrew Travis promoted to Chief Revenue Officer at Foxit in Feb. 2025. Foxit is a provider of PDF and eSignature solutions.
news.summary: Travis is playing a crucial role in boosting Foxit's growth as the go-to company for PDF and eSignature solutions. Based in Fremont, California, Foxit is at the forefront of providing cutting-edge products and services in these areas, aiding knowledge workers in boosting their efficiency. This news was shared on February 18, 2025, although no specific numbers were mentioned in the provided text.

news.headline: Ultra Maritime awarded £18 million contract by UK Ministry of Defence for sonobuoys; critical for anti-submarine warfare.
news.summary: In Greenford, England on February 18, 2025, Ultra Maritime revealed securing a contract worth £18 million from the UK Ministry of Defence (MoD). The contract is for the supply of sonobuoys to the Royal Navy's Merlin Maritime Patrol Helicopter, a vital component of the UK's anti-submarine warfare (ASW) capabilities.

news.headline: insured.io platform hits 2M users amid California insurance carrier exodus. Leading provider of customer engagement.
news.summary: In California, a significant number of insurance carriers leaving the state has resulted in a surge in demand for portal, IVR, and payment services. On February 18, 2025, insured.io, a prominent omnichannel customer engagement solutions provider based in Sacramento, revealed that it achieved a substantial increase in usage, reaching a significant milestone in its insurance services.

news.headline: Northern Tool + Equipment brings Monster Jam® truck to McAllen store, offers free event ticket to customers.
news.summary: A store event in McAllen, Texas is offering customers a special promotion where they can get a complimentary ticket to a Monster Jam® event. Taking place on February 18, 2025, this initiative by Northern Tool + Equipment aims to bring the thrilling Monster Jam® experience to the McAllen community. The event is scheduled for Thursday, March, providing an exclusive opportunity for customers to enjoy this high-octane entertainment.

news.headline: SOPHiA GENETICS (Nasdaq: SOPH) will report Q4 and FY 2024 financial results on March 4, 2025.
news.summary: On February 18, 2025, SOPHiA GENETICS, a prominent data-driven medicine leader and cloud-native software company, revealed plans to unveil its financial performance for the fourth quarter and full year 2024. The information is set to be disclosed before the opening of U.S. markets. SOPHiA GENETICS, trading on Nasdaq under the symbol SOPH, made this announcement jointly from Boston and Rolle, Switzerland.

news.headline: Canadian Core CPI MoM Actual 0.3% (Forecast -, Previous 0.3%)
Buoyant Ventures promotes Laura Katzman and Alex Behar to partners at the firm in Chicago.
news.summary: Buoyant Ventures, a prominent venture capital firm specializing in digital solutions for climate change, has recently appointed Laura Katzman and Alex to the position of Partner. The firm made this announcement on February 18, 2025. The promotion of these two principal investors comes as a recognition of their exceptional deal-making abilities. This move reinforces Buoyant Ventures' commitment to driving investments in sustainable technologies.

news.headline: Canadian CPI Common Actual 2.2% (Forecast -, Previous 2.0%)
TransCelerate BioPharma releases 2024 report, emphasizing strategic vision & board transition, showcasing progress in member initiatives.
news.summary: Announces significant advancements in various member-led projects and presents an ambitious outlook for the pharmaceutical research and development sector. This update was disclosed on Feb. 18, 2025, in Philadelphia. TransCelerate BioPharma, an international non-profit entity, shared its progress, detailing a visionary strategy for the future of the industry.

news.headline: Internet for Growth urges Congress to protect small businesses with a federal privacy framework, promoting economic growth.
news.summary: A coalition of small businesses is calling on congressional leaders to implement a national data privacy standard that protects consumers. They are urging for regulations that balance consumer protection with economic growth. The initiative, Internet for Growth, made this demand on Feb. 18, 2025 in Washington. The coalition believes in the importance of safeguarding data while also avoiding excessive regulations that could hinder economic progress. This move seeks to find a balance between ensuring consumer privacy and fostering a conducive environment for economic growth.

news.headline: U.S. Department of Justice closes investigation of Cole Engineering Services, a By Light company. No wrongdoing found.
news.summary: In McLean, Virginia, on February 18, 2025, Cole Engineering Services Inc. (Cole), a subsidiary of By Light, received notification from the U.S. Department of Justice (DOJ) that they are no longer being investigated. Neither Cole nor By Light were the subject of the investigation. This development comes after an undisclosed period of scrutiny by DOJ.

news.headline: SkyBridge Capital's Scaramucci backs Kinto with $150,000 ahead of token launch in NYC on February 18, 2025.
news.summary: SkyBridge Capital Founder and Managing Partner, Anthony Scaramucci, is looking forward to Kinto's token launch on February 18, 2025, as part of the ongoing shift of traditional finance to blockchain. SkyBridge has invested $150,000 in Kinto, signaling confidence in the project's potential. Scaramucci expressed enthusiasm about this move towards decentralized finance, highlighting the opportunities it presents for innovation and growth in the financial sector.
